column8: orig DDraw FillPrimaryFrontendRect + 16bpp Copy16BitSurfaceRect primer + CPUID/rdtsc-based mhz_estimate; port collapses Phase 5(a) DDraw secondary-surface manifest into D3D11 backbuffer, no primary/secondary surface model
orig ClientToScreen() caches DDraw client-area origin in g_cpuInfo.os_version_string+4; port D3D11 has no primary-surface scanline blit so origin cache is unused; in Phase 5(a) DDraw manifest

orig 16bpp DDraw Lock+memcpy+Unlock with optional colorkey; port collapses to D3D11 backbuffer Present (frontend_present_buffer at 1483); explicit ARCH-DIVERGENCE comment cites Copy16BitSurfaceRect→D3D11 Present
orig software 16bpp present: locks g_frontendBackSurfacePtr + dd_exref+4 primary, scanline-copies g_frontendCanvasW×H into client origin; port collapses HW/SW branches to td5_plat_present(1)

orig resets 6 DDraw sprite/rect/overlay queue counters (_g_frontendOverlayRectArrayCount, sprite blit cursor, etc); port has immediate-mode quad batches with no persistent queue, in Phase 5(a) DDraw manifest
